prompt: A 3D render combining the spherical shape and dark background environment from image 1 with the porous texture and yellow and green materials from image 2.
prompt_refined: Generate a 3D render of a spherical object. The sphere should exhibit the porous, fibrous texture and distinct bright yellow and vibrant green colors found in image 2. It should be centrally placed against a deep black background, mimicking the dark celestial environment seen in image 1.
